assertions.assertion: Response configures ForwardedHeadersOptions with ForwardedHeaders including XForwardedProto to restore the original HTTPS scheme
Response calls UseForwardedHeaders() early in the pipeline, before UseIdentityServer()
Response mentions the ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED=true environment variable as a simpler alternative for cloud/Kubernetes
assertions.rationale: No mention of ASPNETCORE_FORWARDEDHEADERS_ENABLED environment variable

assertions.assertion: Response explains that the reverse proxy strips the original scheme and host headers, causing IdentityServer to generate HTTP URLs in discovery
assertions.rationale: Only says to 'read the X-Forwarded-Proto header'; doesn't explain why the proxy causes the issue
